systems.system_notes: Fixed-bearing medial partial knee platform supported by Microplasty instrumentation and referenced in official Oxford/Vanguard M Zimmer Biomet materials.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials reference the Microplasty instrumentation workflow for the Vanguard M partial knee platform.

components.component_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe fixed-bearing femoral options for the Vanguard M partial knee platform.
Official materials describe the fixed-bearing tibial component used within the Vanguard M unicompartmental construct.
Official materials describe fixed-bearing insert options for the Vanguard M platform.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official public materials in this pass describe system lineage, instrumentation, and implant families without a complete coded item table.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, ordering guide, or parts matrix pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
